meta.slice: Static Interaction Flow + Hero Copy Polish

homepage.title: Your AI Board for high-context work.
heroLines: Input any task, project, sync, or recap.
TWOS assembles AI models — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and more — into a team that plans, checks, builds, executes through approved tools, and reviews the work.
Every result feeds a self-improving loop of feedback, validation, and guardrails.
You approve every tool action before it runs.
homepage.composerPlaceholder: Input an idea, project task, sync, recap, or result...

aiBoardPreview.title: AI Board Auto-Formed
aiBoardPreview.explainer: An AI Board is a task-specific team of AI models. TWOS chooses the roles, locks the next step, and routes approved work to the right tools.
aiBoardPreview.modelPool: ChatGPT · Claude · Gemini · Grok · Approved Tools

Lead Planner.text: turns your input into the next clear step.

Reality Checker.text: checks risk, missing context, and contradictions.

Builder / Tool Handoff.text: routes approved work to the right tool, such as code, docs, email, calendar, or review workflows.

Reviewer.text: validates results and turns mistakes into guardrails.

aiBoardPreview.note: Model names are static mock slots in this MVP. No API, no live routing, no automation.

interactionFlow.text: User enters a task, sync, recap, or result.
TWOS assembles a model team to plan, check, build, and review.
Approved tools wait for user confirmation before running.

details.accountSotMarketDataSplit: Account snapshots and public market data are separate ledgers.
